ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_returns" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "return" REAL /* Daily return of the stock */,
  "log_return" REAL /* Logarithmic return */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the return data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the indicator value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is listed */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for options and futures */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price for options */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset for options and futures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "owner" INTEGER /* User who created the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the position was entered */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the position was exited (if applicable) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the position was entered */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Total cost basis of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the risk model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk model used */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio assessed */,
  "risk_value" REAL /* Risk value calculated */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was performed */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the risk assessment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario simulated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters used in the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio simulated */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value calculated */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who generated the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, trader) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who granted the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
